Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

BiMes 24, 23 [Sale of house][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

md60-AD-URI₃ A ša₂ mARAD-e₂re-eš A ša₂ mdum-qi₂-d60 lu₂I₃.DU₈ ina ḫu-ud ⸢lib₃-bi-šu₂ E₂ ep₂-šu₂⸣

(o 1) Anu-ab-uṣur son of Arad-Reš son of Dumqi-Anu, the gatekeeper, voluntarily sold a house in good repair, property of Anu, with intact door frame, a roofed house, the door and locks installed, which is in the [Ištar Gate] that is in Uruk: the upper northern length next to the foundation of the property of Anu, whose foundation [is exposed]; the lower southern length next to the narrow street "Thoroughfare of the People"; the upper western width next to [...] the gatekeeper; the lower eastern width next to the wide street "Thoroughfare of the Gods and the King". The total of the lengths and widths of the measurements of that house---that house, as much and as little as there is, all of it---for 1/3 mina of refined silver, high quality staters of Seleucus, for the complete price, to Anthiochus son of Timokrates son of Anu-balassu-iqbi descendant of Ahʾutu [in perpetuity ...].

o 22

NIG₂.GA d60 sip-pi rak-su E₂ ru-gu-bu ⸢gišIG⸣ gišsik-kat kun-nu ⸢ša₂ ina KIti₃ KA₂.GAL⸣ [...]

o 33

ša₂ qe₂-reb UNUGki US₂ ANu₂ tu₁₅SI.SA₂ DA te-me-en NIG₂.GA d60 ⸢ša₂ kun-nu x IGImar⸣ [...]

o 44

US₂ KI⸢u₂ tu₁₅U₁₈⸣.LU DA SILA qat₂-nu mu-taq-qa UN-MEŠ SAG.⸢KI AN.TA⸣ [tu₁₅MAR.TU]

o 55

⸢DA x⸣ [...]-⸢x-x lu₂I₃⸣.DU₈ SAG.KI KI.TA tu₁₅⸢KUR⸣.[RA]

o 66

[DA SILA rap-šu₂ mu-taq] DINGIR-MEŠ u LUGAL ⸢ŠU*.NIGIN*⸣ US₂* ⸢u* SAG*.KI* mi*-šiḫ*-tu₄* E₂ MU*⸣-[MEŠ]

o 77

[i-ṣi u ma-a-du ma]-⸢la ba⸣-šu-⸢u₂ gab-bi⸣ a-na 1/3 MA.NA KU₃.⸢BABBAR⸣ [qa-lu-u₂]

o 88

[is-ta-tir-ra-nu ša₂ m]se-lu-⸢ku bab⸣-[ba]-⸢nu⸣-u₂-tu₂ a-na ŠAM₂ ⸢TIL⸣-[MEŠ]

o 99

[a-na man-ti-ʾi-i-ku-su A ša₂ m]⸢ṭim⸣-gi-ra-[te-e A ša₂ m]d60-DIN-su-E A mŠEŠ-⸢ʾu⸣-[u₂-tu]

o 1010

[...] ⸢E₂ MU-MEŠ x x⸣ [...]

(o 10) [...] that house [...] the gatekeepers, bear [responsibility ...] in perpetuity.

remainder broken
Reverse
r 1'r 1'

lu₂I₃.DU₈-MEŠ [... a]-⸢na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄⸣ na-šu-u₂

r 2'2'

E₂ MU-MEŠ ⸢ša₂ man⸣-[ti-ʾi-i]-⸢ku-su⸣ A ša₂ mṭim-gi-ra-te-e A <ša₂> md60-DIN-su-E

(r 2') That house belongs to Antiochus son of Timokrates son of Anu-balassu-iqbi descendant of Ahʾutu, in perpetuity.

r 3'3'

A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu a-⸢na u₄-mu⸣ ṣa-a-tu₂ šu-u₂

(witnesses)
r 4'4'

lu₂⸢mu-kin₇⸣

(r 4') Witness:

r 5'5'

mina-⸢qi₂-bit⸣-d60 A ⸢ša₂ m⸣[d]⸢60-AD⸣-URI₃ A ša₂ md60-DUMU-MUnu A mḫun-zu-u₂

(r 5') Ina-qibit-Anu son of Anu-ab-uṣur son of Anu-mar-ittannu descendant of Hunzu

r 6'6'

md60-ik-ṣur ⸢A ša₂⸣ mNUMUN-⸢ia⸣ A ša₂ m⸢d60-ik-ṣur⸣ A m⸢lu-uš-tam-mar-dIŠKUR⸣

(r 6') Anu-ikṣur son of Zeriya son of Anu-ikṣur descendant of Luštammar-Adad

r 7'7'

mdna-na-⸢a⸣-MU A ša₂ mša₂-d60-iš-šu-u₂ A ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A mE₂-⸢BABBAR-MU⸣-DU₃

(r 7') Nanaya-iddin son of Ša-Anu-iššu son of Nanaya-iddin descendant of Ebabbar-šum-ibni

r 8'8'

m⸢il-lut⸣-d60 A ša₂ md60-DINiṭ A ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU lu₂⸢UNUG⸣ki-a-a

(r 8') Illut-Anu son of Anu-uballiṭ son of Nanaya-iddin, an Urukean

r 9'9'

mARAD-dMAŠ A ša₂ md60-DUMU-MUnu A ša₂ mni-din-⸢tu₄-dINANA⸣ lu₂se-pir NIG₂.⸢GA d60⸣

(r 9') Arad-Ninurta son of Anu-mar-ittannu son of Nidintu-Ištar, interpreter scribe of the property of Anu

r 10'10'

mki-din-d60 A ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU A ša₂ mki-din-d60 lu₂se-pir NIG₂.⸢GA⸣ [d60]

(r 10') Kidin-Anu son of Anu-ahhe-iddin son of Kidin-Anu, interpreter scribe of the property of Anu

r 11'11'

mARAD-dMAŠ A ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-dINANA lu₂se-pir NIG₂.GA d⸢60⸣

(r 11') Arad-Ninurta son of Nidintu-Anu son of Nidintu-Ištar, intepreter scribe of the property of Anu

r 12'12'

mtat-tan-nu A ša₂ mURI₃-šu₂-d60 A ša₂ mla-ba-ši lu₂I₃.DU₈

(r 12') Tattannu son of Uṣuršu-Anu son of Labaši, gatekeeper

uninscribed line
(colophon)
r 13'13'

md60-EN-šu₂-nu lu₂UMBISAG A ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 A md30-TI-ER₂ UNUGki ⸢itiŠE⸣

(r 13') Anu-belšunu, scribe, son of Nidintu-Anu, descendant of Sin-leqi-unninni. Uruk. Addaru. 16th day. 133rd year. Seleucus (being) king.

r 14'14'

U₄ 16-KAM₂ MU 133-KAM₂ mse-lu-ku ⸢LUGAL⸣

1corresponding seal impression on duplicate = AUWE 19, 332

2corresponding seal in this position in duplicate = AUWE 19, 322: Nanaya-iddin; first seal of this edge on duplicate = AUWE 19, 25: Illut-Anu

33rd seal on corresponding edge of duplicate

4duplicate has seal of Anu-ab-uṣur, AUWE 19, 566
